title: FastCrystalSpin
description: A lightweight Fabric client-side visual tweak that speeds up End Crystal display and spin animations without changing game mechanics.
body:
### Fast Crystal Spin is a lightweight Fabric client-side mod that speeds up and smooths the end crystal rotation animation, making crystal PvP visuals feel snappier and cleaner.

## **Features**

Faster / smoother end crystal spin animation

Lightweight and simple (no extra config)

/crystalspin set [spinning speed]

/crystalspin reload

Client-side only

## **Compatibility**

Minecraft 1.20.1-6, 1.21.X, 26.1.X

Fabric Loader + Fabric API

## **Notes**

If you encounter issues, please report them on the GitHub [issues](https://github.com/ggunderscoreg/FastCrystalSpin/issues) page.

==================================================================================
### Fast Crystal Spin 是一个轻量级的 Fabric 客户端模组，用于加快并平滑末影水晶的旋转动画，让水晶 PVP 的视觉效果更干脆、更顺滑。

## **功能**

更快 / 更平滑的末影水晶旋转动画

轻量简单（无需额外配置）

/crystalspin set [旋转速度]

/crystalspin reload

仅客户端生效

## **兼容性**

Minecraft 1.20.1–1.20.6、1.21.X, 26.1.X

Fabric Loader + Fabric API

## **备注**

如果你遇到问题，请在 GitHub 的 [issues](https://github.com/ggunderscoreg/FastCrystalSpin/issues) 页面提交反馈。
